news.title: Stock Futures Drift Lower, Oil Rises After Iran Fires Missiles at Israel
news.summary: Stock futures were dropping, potentially extending the indexes’ selloff on Friday.  Oil futures were set to react to new attacks as the Iran war marks its 100th day with no peace deal in sight.  Just after 6 p.m. Eastern time, S&P 500 futures were down 0.4%, while Nasdaq futures were down 0.3% as were Dow futures.
